name: Digital Equipment Corporation
status_note: Acquired by Compaq in June 1998 for $9.6 billion; Compaq subsequently acquired by HP in 2002.

name: Aberdeen Group
status_note: Aberdeen Group was acquired by Harte-Hanks in 2001; research brand absorbed into Harte-Hanks and later Aberdeen.com.

name: Lotus Development Corporation
status_note: Acquired by IBM in 1995 for $3.5 billion; Lotus Notes evolved into HCL Notes after HCL Technologies acquired the product from IBM in 2019.

name: Microsoft Corporation
status_note: Publicly traded (NASDAQ: MSFT); still active as of 2026.

name: Oracle Corporation
status_note: Publicly traded (NYSE: ORCL); still active as of 2026.

name: Informix Corporation
status_note: Acquired by IBM in 2001 for approximately $1 billion; Informix database product line continues under IBM.

name: Computer Associates International (CA Ingres)
status_note: CA Technologies rebranded as Broadcom Software after Broadcom acquired CA in 2018; CA Ingres database product originally from Ingres Corporation, later CA.

name: Sybase Inc.
status_note: Acquired by SAP AG in 2010 for $5.8 billion.

name: Compaq Computer Corporation
status_note: Acquired Digital Equipment Corporation in 1998; itself acquired by HP in 2002.

name: Hewlett-Packard Company
status_note: Split into HP Inc. and Hewlett Packard Enterprise in 2015; both entities remain active as of 2026.
